entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Health data source for intraday activity and heart rate syncing

entities.name: workout_tracker
entities.context: Internal module/object that stores intraday activity and heart rate data into a database

entities.name: Intraday Activity Sync
entities.context: Pipeline that fetches and stores per-minute activity metrics (steps, distance, calories, floors, elevation) from Fitbit

entities.name: Intraday Heart Rate Sync
entities.context: Pipeline that fetches and stores per-minute heart rate (BPM) data from Fitbit

entities.name: Heart Rate Zones
entities.context: Classification of heart rate readings into zones (field present but set to None in raw ingestion)

entities.name: SQLite/DuckDB Connection
entities.context: Database connection object (conn) used to persist synced health data locally

relationships.context: Fetches intraday steps, distance, calories, floors, elevation via Fitbit API
Fetches intraday heart rate BPM data via Fitbit API
Writes intraday activity and heart rate samples to local database via replace_intraday_activity_for_date
Delegates storage of fetched activity samples to workout_tracker module
Heart rate data points include a zone field for future classification
Both are sub-pipelines of the same date-level intraday sync function (_sync_intraday_for_date)
